project_type: Python six-line divination (Liu Yao) analysis system based on Zhu Chenbin's theory
build_system: None (pure Python package, no build tooling)
test_framework: pytest with class-based test organization in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: Run pytest on all tests. Also run python3 -m liuyao.main --date 2024-01-15 --yao 8 7 7 9 7 8 --question-type cai to verify end-to-end.
environment_constraints: sxtwl library required for calendar conversion. No other external dependencies.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns: Chinese docstrings, dataclass-based data structures, modular architecture with each analysis aspect in its own file.
key_patterns: Each module exports a main analysis function (e.g., analyze_dongbian, analyze_hexagram_wangshuai). The analyzer.py orchestrates all modules. report.py formats output. data.py contains all static tables and utility functions. hexagram.py defines Hexagram and YaoLine dataclasses. Tests mirror source structure with class-based grouping.
directory_structure: liuyao/ - main package with modules for each analysis aspect. tests/ - pytest test files. Root has .md knowledge base files.
